TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kasavakan = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Kasavakan. 604 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,637 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 49% niqan 799 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 51% niqan 838 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Puyuma38%, Amis5%, Bunun1%, Paiwan2%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = kasa*akan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ kasa*akan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, pujuma**%, amis*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Kasavakan = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Kasavakan. 604 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,637 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 49% niqan 799 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 51% niqan 838 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Puyuma38%, Amis5%, Bunun1%, Paiwan2%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = kasa*akan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ kasa*akan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, pujuma**%, amis*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
